subcodes.first_line: The people of certitude may suppose that the events of this world are as naught and non-existent in the estimation of the party of God, yet witness thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اهل یقین را گمان آنکه حوادث عالم نزد حزب الهی معدوم و مفقود است و حال مشاهده
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God
